description: Taxonomy of scholarly misuse patterns for Anxiety of Influence analysis.

values.name: Misreading
values.use_when: the source text is represented substantively incorrectly
values.avoid_when: the issue is omission, citation practice, or historical framing rather than substantive representation

values.name: Unacknowledged Debt
values.use_when: the target depends on the source thinker’s conceptual or scholarly labor without adequate credit
values.avoid_when: the source is cited directly and the issue is instead selective use or distortion

values.name: Misappropriation
values.use_when: the target deploys a source concept for ends the source explicitly resists or would reject
values.avoid_when: the target merely simplifies or partially omits the source

values.name: Decontextualization
values.use_when: the target strips an idea from the philosophical, historical, or methodological context that makes it intelligible
values.avoid_when: the issue is direct contradiction rather than contextual stripping

values.name: Selective Citation
values.use_when: the target cites only the favorable slice of a position and omits source material that complicates or undercuts it
values.avoid_when: the thinker is not cited at all

values.name: Flattening
values.use_when: a multidimensional or tension-filled position is reduced to one simplified dimension
values.avoid_when: the target invents a claim the source never made

values.name: Ventriloquism
values.use_when: the target attributes a position or wording to the source that the source never held
values.avoid_when: the issue is better described as interpretive distortion rather than fabricated attribution

values.name: Strategic Silence
values.use_when: the source thinker is the necessary interlocutor but is not cited or engaged where they obviously should be
values.avoid_when: the thinker is actually engaged, even if inadequately

values.name: Premature Synthesis
values.use_when: the target treats unresolved debates or contested positions as already settled
values.avoid_when: the issue is mainly authority laundering or a direct misreading

values.name: Legitimation Borrowing
values.use_when: the source thinker is invoked mainly to legitimize a position they would not endorse
values.avoid_when: the target is actually building on the source’s framework, even if selectively

guidance: Assign exactly one dominant sin type per finding.
Prefer the most discriminating category rather than the most dramatic one.
Use strategic_silence only when the thinker’s absence is itself the key scholarly failure.
